title: Germinator
notes:
Germinator is a flash game on the PBS Kids Fetch! with Ruff 
Ruffman website. You play as Gorm, trying to avoid the enemies and enter
 through the bodies of Crumpet, Trumpet, Dump-it, and Nelson, who are 
planning to take over the world. To get to Nelson's mouth, you will need
 to get past the Spit and Mouthwash, to get to Dump-it's nose, you must 
avoid the Snot and Soap & Water, to get to Trumpe

title: Smoothie Operator
notes: update: I'm sorry for people hoping to play this but I will not remove this due to archive, I wish not to lose a flash even if it doesn't run like it use to. Sadly this flash is unable to run right due to it running on internet.who knows tho. someone may look into the files of this and make it playable again, this is also why I wish not to remove this. Thank you for understanding.

title: Pico's School: Love Conquers All
notes: [Newgrounds Description on Pico's School Webpage]As you’ve probably noticed, Friday Night Funkin’ is a really popular game. FNF is also a celebration of Newgrounds, featuring cameos by various characters from NG history.One of those characters is Pico, from this game I made in 1999 called Pico’s School. As a result of FNF, thousands of people are discovering and playing Pico’s School every day now

title: Game Over Gopher
notes: Play in English			Juega en EspañolHungry space gophers are after the prized carrot. Defend the carrot by placing units on a coordinate grid. Game Over Gopher is Common Core-compliant and addresses topics such as plotting coordinate pairs, differentiating negative coordinates from positive coordinates, and identifying the four quadrants.A finalist in the 2012 Serious Games Showcase & Challenge

title: School Uniform Designer!
notes: Note: This is the third version of a game Hapuriainen made based on school uniforms.Create your very own schoolgirl characters (or recreate yourself/any other existing characters) and dress them up in lovely school uniforms with a gazillion versatile options and colors to choose from! You can recreate a uniform from your favorite anime or your very own school, if it has any or do one from scratch!

title: McDonald's Mighty Kids Meal Promo
notes: A soundless, looping promotional Flash presentation for the Mighty Kids Meal at McDonald's. (For those unaware, that's a version of their traditional Happy Meal with a larger main course, targeted at older children who would find the regular version to be too small for their appetite.) This was made sometime in the early 2000s - no earlier than 2001, when the meal itself was first introduced.

title: Pango Comics: cartoon for kids
notes: Dive into the MAGIC of readingDive into the MAGIC of reading.PANGO COMICS helps children from 3 years old read stories "all by themselves".FOLLOW the story without speech bubbles or text, and LAUGH at gentle and funny twists.Big square boxes, clean and simple layouts, and a fluid narration to get familiar with the MAGIC of reading.Through delicious adventures, Pango stimulates your IMAGINATION!48

title: Dream On: Tournament Edition
notes: a lazy quality-of-life mod of the Arthur flash game, Dream On. This adds 3 player support, a starting level selector (doesn't unlock all the levels, but just enough to start midway through if you lose), and a difficulty selector.Normal: only Buster can lose lives. Ruster and Custer lose once hit.Hard: all characters can lose lives.Delicatessen: all characters can lose lives, start with only 1 life

Try to win the game by struggling with your opponent.HOW TO PLAYPLAYER 1PPress key [W] = UPPress Key [S] = DOWNPress Key [D] = Run ElephantPLAYER 2PPress key [↑] = UPPress Key [↓] = DOWNPress Key [←] = Run Elephant1: Wait until power guage is full before unleashing elephants2: Send as many elephants as y
